Ristagír and Mílien can be found outside her home in the Fourth Circle of Minas Tirith. Ristagír has asked you to meet him and his nephew at Mílien's …
Círgon can be found outside his home in the Fourth Circle of Minas Tirith. You have spoken to Círgon's family and should now speak to him.
